Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema

Class JsonSchemaGeneratorSession

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ContextSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingTraverseSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGeneratorSession
All Implemented Interfaces:
BeanSession, ConverterSession
public class JsonSchemaGeneratorSession extends MarshallingTraverseSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonSchemaSerializer.
Notes:
  • This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
See Also:
  • JSON-Schema Support

  • Constructor Details

    • JsonSchemaGeneratorSession

      protected JsonSchemaGeneratorSession(JsonSchemaGeneratorSession.Builder builder)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      builder - The builder for this object.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static JsonSchemaGeneratorSession.Builder create(JsonSchemaGenerator ctx)
      Creates a new builder for this object.
      Parameters:
      ctx - The context creating this session.
      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      A new builder.

    • addBeanDef

      public JsonSchemaGeneratorSession addBeanDef(String id, JsonMap def)
      Adds a schema definition to this session.
      Parameters:
      id - The definition ID.
      Cannot be null.
      def - The definition schema.
      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • getBeanDefId

      public String getBeanDefId(ClassMeta<?> cm)
      Returns the definition ID for the specified class.
      Parameters:
      cm - The class to get the definition ID of.
      Returns:
      The definition ID for the specified class.

    • getBeanDefs

      public Map<String,JsonMap> getBeanDefs()
      Returns the definitions that were gathered during this session.

      This map is modifiable and affects the map in the session.

      Returns:
      The definitions that were gathered during this session, or null if JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder.useBeanDefs() was not enabled.

    • getBeanDefUri

      public URI getBeanDefUri(ClassMeta<?> cm)
      Returns the definition URI for the specified class.
      Parameters:
      cm - The class to get the definition URI of.
      Returns:
      The definition URI for the specified class.

    • getBeanDefUri

      public URI getBeanDefUri(String id)
      Returns the definition URI for the specified class.
      Parameters:
      id - The definition ID to get the definition URI of.
      Returns:
      The definition URI for the specified class.

    • getJsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta

      public JsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta getJsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm)
      Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean property.
      Parameters:
      bpm - The bean property to return the metadata on.
      Returns:
      The metadata.

    • getJsonSchemaClassMeta

      public JsonSchemaClassMeta getJsonSchemaClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm)
      Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified class.
      Parameters:
      cm - The class to return the metadata on.
      Returns:
      The metadata.

    • getSchema

      public JsonMap getSchema(ClassMeta<?> cm) throws MarshallingRecursionException, SerializeException
      Returns the JSON-schema for the specified type.
      Parameters:
      cm - The object type.
      Returns:
      The schema for the type.
      Throws:
      MarshallingRecursionException - Bean recursion occurred.
      SerializeException - Error occurred.

    • getSchema

      public JsonMap getSchema(Object o) throws MarshallingRecursionException, SerializeException
      Returns the JSON-schema for the specified object.
      Parameters:
      o - The object.
      Can either be a POJO or a Class/Type.
      Returns:
      The schema for the type.
      Throws:
      MarshallingRecursionException - Bean recursion occurred.
      SerializeException - Error occurred.

    • getSchema

      public JsonMap getSchema(Type type) throws MarshallingRecursionException, SerializeException
      Returns the JSON-schema for the specified type.
      Parameters:
      type - The object type.
      Returns:
      The schema for the type.
      Throws:
      MarshallingRecursionException - Bean recursion occurred.
      SerializeException - Error occurred.

    • getAddDescriptionsTo

      protected final Set<TypeCategory> getAddDescriptionsTo()
      Add descriptions to types.
      Returns:
      Set of categories of types that descriptions should be automatically added to generated schemas.
      See Also:
      • JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder.addDescriptionsTo(TypeCategory...)

    • getAddExamplesTo

      protected final Set<TypeCategory> getAddExamplesTo()
      Add examples.
      Returns:
      Set of categories of types that examples should be automatically added to generated schemas.
      See Also:
      • JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder.addExamplesTo(TypeCategory...)

    • getBeanDefMapper

      protected final MarshallingDefMapper getBeanDefMapper()
      Bean schema definition mapper.
      Returns:
      Interface to use for converting Bean classes to definition IDs and URIs.
      See Also:
      • JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder.beanDefMapper(Class)

    • getIgnoreTypes

      protected final List<Pattern> getIgnoreTypes()
      Ignore types from schema definitions.
      Returns:
      Custom schema information for particular class types.
      See Also:
      • JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder.ignoreTypes(String...)

    • isAllowNestedDescriptions

      protected final boolean isAllowNestedDescriptions()
      Allow nested descriptions.
      Returns:
      true if nested descriptions are allowed in schema definitions.
      See Also:
      • JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder.allowNestedDescriptions()

    • isAllowNestedExamples

      protected final boolean isAllowNestedExamples()
      Allow nested examples.
      Returns:
      true if nested examples are allowed in schema definitions.
      See Also:
      • JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder.allowNestedExamples()

    • isUseBeanDefs

      protected final boolean isUseBeanDefs()
      Use bean definitions.
      Returns:
      true if schemas on beans will be serialized with '$ref' tags.
      See Also:
      • JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder.useBeanDefs()
